nasb.text: For we have become partakers of Christ, if we hold fast the beginning of our assurance firm until the end,

esv.text: For we have come to share in Christ, if indeed we hold our original confidence firm to the end.

cnv.text: 如果我們把起初的信念堅持到底，就是有分於基督的人了。

ccb.text: 如果我们将起初的信念坚持到底，便在基督里有份了。

csbs.text: 因为我们如果把那起初的确信，坚定地持守到底，我们就成为基督的同伴了。
